description.value:
Frequency once per round

Requirements You're taking persistent bleed damage.

When you're bleeding, you can strategically realign your chitinous plates to apply pressure, staunch your wounds, and improve your chances of stopping the bleeding altogether. Attempt a flat check to recover from the persistent bleed damage. The DC of this check is 10 instead of 15. Even if you fail, the DC of the recovery check to stop the bleeding at the end of your turn is reduced to 10 this round as well.
